answer:
Adam meets Katherine when he skeptically begins going to her as a therapist; she is a young and inexperienced PhD candidate doing the clinical aspect of her thesis at the hospital. Their sessions start off rocky but eventually develop into a deeper rapport. Thus, their first meeting occurs in a professional medical context. 

\boxed{\text{Adam meets Katherine as his therapist at the hospital, where she is a PhD candidate conducting clinical work for her thesis.}}
